text.message: Red we'll need to help each other
Blue you have the best setup beo
im on every block here btw
i need it to fight devs
gotta keep 8 wheat blocked the best we can
Sorry I kinda need road space
and u traded oj who could be on 8
Yeah but 8 is being blocked the entire time
But you gotta see it from my pov
bro u had road either way
I’m behind and I gotta get in the game
And you’re also on devs, so you don’t need that many settles
u only put oj more ahead
We had to take that spot from oj
Will be fine for a turn
2 brick for a wood ill do
I think I settle and hope for 6
I understand you’re mad about the plow
But you don’t have to be a asss about it man
Its taken a spot from oj was important
There wasn’t a threat to extend at that point
so then why ask for cards
I soloed and got no cards
I don’t make sheep so this hurts
I need the brick to drop another road
F I have no brick and the wood rolls then I can’t drop another
Why am I being asked for multiple cards to preserve your guys winning chances
Depends on if you are going for road
im not i needed a settle spot
And how many VPs you have
ive been giving u me road mats
i just had the perfect hand
You drop a road to win
How you work that out lol
